reviews.review_msg: Was a little skeptical about this class since he did not provide clear instructions, but that was the whole point! This is not your typical memorizing and regurgitating the textbook class because this class teaches you to become more aware of your emotions and how to appropriately communicate those emotions. highly recommended!
Over all a good prof, lectures can be a bit of a drag sometimes and the textbook is just horrible, excessively long, repetitive, and unnecessarily convoluted.
Hes good, young and has a lot of experience in the workforce

Draining+exhausting class. Unclear grading criteria, unhelpful prof, extremely rude feedback on assignments, be prepared to be spending 10+ hours PER week on this class. You won't understand what's expected of you - he'll tell you to figure it out on your own. This class DOES prepare you to be a consultant ... at the cost of your mental health.

Ron is still the best professor I've encountered after 4 years of taking courses at SFU. He takes the time to ensure everyone is on the same page, and if not, he guides you through your stuck points. He wants you to get a good mark! Would 100% recommend any student to take on a course he teaches.
